name: whtyce
description: Mobile terminal with voice input — run a command, get a link

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "try{require('canvas')}catch(e){console.log('
  [whtyce] canvas not installed — Telegram screenshots disabled.
  To fix: apt install -y build-essential libcairo2-dev libjpeg-dev libpango1.0-dev libgif-dev librsvg2-dev && npm rebuild canvas
')}"
